title: Budweiser King Of Beers Mirrored Typography

typography_summary: Sans bold display rotacionado/mirrored + sans body footer
composition_summary: Bottle absolutely centered · type chaos pattern

Two-color brand palette (red + white) tradicional mas conceito original
caveats: Concept específico Budweiser — só para STUDY de typography manipulation experimental. Fora do tom Só Rio totalmente
